drafts.name: Family Service Agency of Santa Barbara County (Santa Maria)
drafts.note: Family/women support services, large local client base — good for coupon distribution

drafts.name: Domestic Violence Solutions (Santa Maria)
drafts.note: Empowers women survivors; ask for the volunteer/community-engagement coordinator (1-2 day reply)

drafts.name: Santa Maria Valley Chamber — Member Experience (Cara)
drafts.note: Runs member events; can promote to women-owned member businesses; also molly@santamaria.com (VP Membership)

drafts.name: St. Mary of the Assumption Catholic Church (Guadalupanas / women's guild)
drafts.note: Large heavily-Latina parish; office is the gateway to the women's ministry / Guadalupanas leaders
